author_identification.canonical_name_ar: موفق الدين أبو محمد عبد الله بن أحمد بن محمد بن قدامة الجماعيلي المقدسي ثم الدمشقي الحنبلي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent Hanbali scholar, jurist, and hadith specialist

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of high-chain (عوالي) hadiths, significant in the Hanbali tradition
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Important for its focus on high-chain hadiths and its association with Ibn Qudamah
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: الضياء المقدسي is a respected scholar and editor in hadith studies
edition_known_issues: Only parts of the manuscript (second and seventh sections) are available
